allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "== JAVA =="; if \($env:JAVA_HOME\) { Write-Output "JAVA_HOME=$env:JAVA_HOME" } else { Write-Output "JAVA_HOME nao definido" }; try { \(Get-Command java -ErrorAction Stop\).Source; java -version } catch { Write-Output "java nao encontrado no PATH" }; Write-Output "== ANDROID SDK =="; Write-Output "ANDROID_HOME=$env:ANDROID_HOME"; Write-Output "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT"; $sdk="$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; if \(Test-Path $sdk\) { Write-Output "SDK encontrado em: $sdk" } else { Write-Output "SDK nao encontrado em $sdk" })
